title: SV interface/modport not compiling in Icarus

features.name: interface modport as module port type
features.description: Code should include a module port declaration using an interface type with modport selector syntax (interfacename.modport)

features.name: parameterized interface with modport
features.description: Code should include a parameterized interface with modport declarations, instantiated and passed to module ports using interface.modport syntax

features.name: interface with multiple modport definitions
features.description: Code should include an interface defining multiple modports (src and drn) with different signal access, used as module port types
